name: draft
description: Prose editing workflows built on Deirdre McCloskey's Economical Writing: critique drafts read-only or tighten them in place.

interface.longDescription: Read-only critique and in-place tightening workflows for prose drafts, built around Deirdre McCloskey's standards for economy, clarity, and plain phrasing.
defaultPrompt: Use $critique to review this draft without editing it.
Use $tighten to apply a rigorous line edit to this file.
